title: NeoCompass
description: A simple mod that adds a HUD compass.
body:
![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a311bf756346229712f9b45905f0c5f1b3aa285e.png)
# NeoCompass
Minimalist HUD compass displaying your direction at the top of the screen.

## Features

- **HUD Compass** — always know your direction at a glance
- **Temperature-Based Colors** — north is cold (cyan), south is warm (orange)
- **Minimal Design** — thin lines, transparent background, never distracting
- **Fully Configurable** — scale, position, and toggle through config

## Specifications

- NeoForge 1.21.1
- Client-side mod
- Completely customizable
- Negligible performance impact

## Configuration

Adjust via mod config:
- `enabled` — toggle compass visibility
- `yOffset` — distance from top of screen
- `scale` — compass scale

![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4d86e34e4c1a2a928304b316491b5310571d9841.png)

**This mod was developed for my MMO-RPG project. If you require support for it, please create a ticket or contact me via direct messages on the Discord server.**
